text: Senator Graham: Mr. President: take control of the Strait of Hormuz and keep the blockade in place. Then you will truly have all the cards.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员：总统先生：控制霍尔木兹海峡并保持封锁。这样你才能真正掌握所有筹码。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif held a call with Iranian President Pezeshkian to discuss the unfolding regional situation and negotiations with the U.S. He thanked Iran for their continued engagement in negotiations and for sending a negotiation team of high level officials to Islamabad for negotiations with the U.S. He shared insights from recent engagements with Qatari, Turkish, and Saudi officials and reassured that Pakistan is committed to being and honest and sincere facilitator of peace. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 巴基斯坦总理谢里夫与伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬通电话，讨论了当前地区局势以及与美国的谈判。他感谢伊朗持续参与谈判，并派遣高级别官员谈判小组前往伊斯兰堡与美国进行谈判。他分享了近期与卡塔尔、土耳其和沙特官员接触的见解，并重申巴基斯坦致力于成为诚实、真诚的和平促进者。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Footage documents an Israeli soldier smashes the head of a statue of Jesus Christ in southern Lebanon. The statue belongs to the town of Debel in the Bint Jbeil region. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Following the incident the Israeli army announced that they are currently working to verify the authenticity of the image. The incident will be investigated thoroughly and in depth, if necessary appropriate measures will be taken based on the findings. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 视频记录了一名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部砸毁一座耶稣基督雕像的头部。该雕像属于宾特朱拜勒地区的德贝尔镇。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 事件发生后，以色列军队宣布他们目前正在核实该图像的真实性。该事件将进行彻底和深入的调查，如有必要，将根据调查结果采取适当措施。@wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Iran has denied reports about a second round of negotiations in Islamabad. 📺 State media says progress is being blocked by what it calls excessive U.S. demands, unrealistic positions, ongoing contradictions, the continued naval blockade (which it claims violates the ceasefire), and threatening rhetoric. 📌 “Under these conditions, there is no clear prospect for productive negotiations,” the report states. U.S. statements were also described as a “media game” and “blame game” aimed at pressuring Iran. 🟥 Meanwhile, CNN, citing Iranian sources, reports that an Iranian delegation is still expected to arrive in Islamabad on Tuesday. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 伊朗否认了关于在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮谈判的报道。📺 国家媒体称，谈判进展受阻，原因是所谓的美国过度要求、不切实际的立场、持续的矛盾、持续的海上封锁（伊朗称其违反了停火协议）以及威胁性言论。📌 报告指出：“在这种情况下，没有明确的富有成效的谈判前景。”美国的声明也被描述为旨在向伊朗施压的“媒体游戏”和“指责游戏”。🟥 与此同时，美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）援引伊朗消息人士的话报道称，预计伊朗代表团仍将于周二抵达伊斯兰堡。与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran says it has not approved sending a delegation to Pakistan and will not do so while the naval blockade remains in place - Tasnim Tasnim: Iran says it is closely tracking U.S. force movements, viewing them either as pressure tactics in negotiations or preparation for a sudden strike. Tehran warned that any attack would trigger retaliation against key energy targets, including Aramco facilities, Yanbu, and the Fujairah pipeline . - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗表示尚未批准派遣代表团前往巴基斯坦，并且在海上封锁仍然存在的情况下不会这样做 - 塔斯尼姆通讯社 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗表示正在密切跟踪美国军队的动向，将其视为谈判中的施压策略或为突然袭击做准备。德黑兰警告称，任何攻击都将引发对关键能源目标的报复，包括沙特阿美设施、延布和富查伊拉管道。 - 开源情报 推文

text: Open Source Intel Tasnim: Iran says it is closely tracking U.S. force movements, viewing them either as pressure tactics in negotiations or preparation for a sudden strike. Tehran warned that any attack would trigger retaliation against key energy targets, including Aramco facilities, Yanbu, and the Fujairah pipeline . tweet

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese civilians returning home in southern Lebanon found Hezbollah weapons, drone equipment, and operatives' bodies left behind in their destroyed houses. Al-Hadath reports Hezbollah warned residents not to discuss their homes being used for military operations, especially north of the Litani. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 返回黎巴嫩南部的黎巴嫩平民在他们被毁的房屋中发现了真主党留下的武器、无人机设备和武装人员的尸体。据Al-Hadath报道，真主党警告居民不要讨论他们的房屋被用于军事行动的事，特别是在利塔尼河以北地区。 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 BREAKING | Tasnim News Agency: Iran has warned that it is fully prepared for a possible resumption of war, citing recent U.S. military movements including warship redeployments, an unprecedented air bridge for equipment transfer, and extensive reconnaissance drone flights over Iranian islands. Tehran has outlined two scenarios: U.S. military posturing as psychological pressure to gain negotiating leverage, or a cover for a surprise attack – noting that Washington has twice struck Iran during ongoing negotiations. Iran stated that it has reconstructed and prepared over the past two weeks, and that any new conflict would create “memorable hellish hours” from the outset. If war resumes and Iranian infrastructure is targeted again, Tehran warned it will abandon previous restraint and expand the conflict to include Bab al‑Mandab, Saudi Aramco facilities, Yanbu, and Fujairah. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 突发新闻 | 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗警告称，已为战争可能重启做好充分准备，并列举了美国近期的军事动向，包括军舰重新部署、前所未有的装备转运空中桥梁，以及在伊朗岛屿上空进行的大规模侦察无人机飞行。德黑兰概述了两种情况：美国军事姿态是为获得谈判筹码而进行的心理施压，或者是突然袭击的掩护——并指出华盛顿在谈判进行期间曾两次打击伊朗。伊朗表示，过去两周已进行了重建和准备，任何新的冲突从一开始就会制造“令人难忘的地狱时刻”。如果战争重启且伊朗基础设施再次成为目标，德黑兰警告将放弃此前的克制，并将冲突扩大到包括曼德海峡、沙特阿美设施、延布和富查伊拉。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel and Lebanon will hold a second meeting this week to finalize a date and location for direct negotiations, according to a diplomatic source cited by Lebanon's MTV News. The U.S. has requested that extending the ceasefire be raised in the preparatory meeting. The proposed extension ranges from 10 days to one month. A visit by Lebanese President Joseph Aoun to the U.S. is under consideration. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据黎巴嫩MTV新闻援引外交消息人士称，以色列和黎巴嫩本周将举行第二次会议，以确定直接谈判的日期和地点。美国已要求在预备会议上提出延长停火协议的问题。提议的延长期限从10天到一个月不等。黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩访问美国的计划正在考虑中。 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Iran will not take part in the second round of talks with the US in Pakistan, the official Iranian press agency IRNA reported. "According to IRNA's foreign policy correspondent, America's excessive demands, unreasonable and unrealistic demands, frequent changes in positions, constant contradictions, and the continuation of the so-called naval blockade, which is considered a violation of the ceasefire agreement, along with threatening rhetoric, have so far hindered the progress of the negotiations, and in these circumstances, there is no clear prospect for fruitful negotiations." tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）据伊朗官方通讯社IRNA报道，伊朗将不会参加在巴基斯坦举行的第二轮美伊会谈。“据IRNA外交政策记者称，美国过分的要求、不合理和不切实际的要求、频繁的立场变化、不断的矛盾、以及所谓的持续海上封锁（这被视为违反了停火协议），加上威胁性的言论，迄今为止阻碍了谈判的进展，在这种情况下，没有明确的富有成效的谈判前景。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to קבינט מדיני ביטחוני - מוריה אסרף & דורון קדוש: "צה״ל בוחן תיעוד של לוחם צה״ל, לכאורה, מנתץ פסל של ישו בכפר נוצרי בדרום לבנון. מדובר צה״ל נמסר:״פעולות אלו אינן עולות בקנה אחד עם ערכי צה״ל וההתנהלות המצופה מחייליו.האירוע יתוחקר באופן יסודי ומעמיק, ובמידת הצורך יינקטו צעדים בהתאם לממצאים״." They will also investigate the desecration of graves in south Lebanon?
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 קבינט מדיני ביטחוני - מוריה אסרף & דורון קדוש：“以色列国防军正在调查一名以色列国防军士兵据称在黎巴嫩南部一个基督教村庄砸毁耶稣雕像的视频。以色列国防军发言人表示：‘这些行为不符合以色列国防军的价值观及其士兵应有的行为。该事件将进行彻底和深入的调查，如有必要，将根据调查结果采取措施。’”他们也会调查黎巴嫩南部墓地的亵渎行为吗？

text: Officials said to the newspaper that it aims to prevent residents' return and entrench an Israeli security zone inside Lebanon. This constitutes further evidence of an Israeli systematic strategy of erasing villages and ethnic cleansing with an aim of perpetuating the occupation. All of this is done under the coverage of arbitrary interpretation of the concept of "the right to self defence" that Israel is holding under the agreement announced by Washington on 16 April without any condemnation from the Lebanese government. Haaretz reported in June 2025 that private contractors in Gaza were receiving around $1,500 (5,000 shekels) for every house they demolish, and were making a fortune. The newspaper added that these contractors demolish wherever they want and even in areas not designated for demolition, and that Palestinians were killed while Israeli forces were protecting them.
text_zh: 官员们对该报表示，此举旨在阻止居民返回，并在黎巴嫩境内巩固一个以色列安全区。这进一步证明了以色列正在实施一种系统性战略，即通过抹除村庄和种族清洗来永久占领。所有这一切都是在华盛顿于4月16日宣布的协议下，以对“自卫权”概念的任意解读为掩护进行的，而黎巴嫩政府对此未作任何谴责。《国土报》在2025年6月报道称，加沙的私人承包商每拆除一栋房屋可获得约1500美元（5000谢克尔），并因此发了大财。该报补充说，这些承包商想拆哪里就拆哪里，甚至包括那些未被指定拆除的区域，而且在以色列军队保护他们时，有巴勒斯坦人被杀害。

text: 🇱🇧 The destruction caused by Israel in southern Lebanon. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 以色列在黎巴嫩南部造成的破坏。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Report: Civilian contractors carry out the destruction of civilian infrastructure in southern Lebanon modeled on Gaza operations The Israeli army continues to demolish homes and civilian infrastructure in southern Lebanon, violating the 10-day ceasefire in Lebanon. Haaretz reported today citing sources, that by destroying civilian infrastructure south of the Litani River, Israel is employing a policy modeled on Gaza operations, with contractors and heavy machinery demolishing civilian infrastructure south of the Litani. The newspaper, citing military sources, reported that dozens of engineering vehicles had been recently deployed in Southern Lebanon, most operated by civilian contractors who receive bonuses based on the number of buildings they demolish. It added that some of these contractors had previously worked in Gaza.
text_zh: 报告：民用承包商在黎巴嫩南部进行基础设施破坏，模式仿照加沙行动。以色列军队继续在黎巴嫩南部拆除房屋和民用基础设施，违反了黎巴嫩的10天停火协议。《国土报》今日援引消息人士的话报道称，通过摧毁利塔尼河以南的民用基础设施，以色列正在采用一种仿照加沙行动的政策，由承包商和重型机械在利塔尼河以南拆除民用基础设施。该报援引军方消息人士的话报道称，最近在黎巴嫩南部部署了数十辆工程车辆，其中大多数由民用承包商操作，他们根据拆除建筑物的数量获得奖金。该报还补充说，其中一些承包商此前曾在加沙工作过。

text: So what are Israeli soldier and civilians doing now in south Lebanon? Israeli soldiers are working on building bases while Israeli civilians are working on demolishing Lebanon towns. Yes you heard right. Israeli civilians
text_zh: 那么以色列士兵和平民现在在黎巴嫩南部做什么？以色列士兵正在忙于建立基地，而以色列平民则在忙于拆毁黎巴嫩城镇。是的，你没听错。以色列平民。

text: In the past 24 hours, more than 37 Israeli soldiers were injured in south Lebanon Yet some people want you to believe south Lebanon was an easy breeze. ❗️ Israeli injuries in south Lebanon are close to 700, with more than 50-60 severaly injured or medium. That's a lot of disabilities and vegetables
text_zh: 在过去24小时内，超过37名以色列士兵在黎巴嫩南部受伤。然而有些人却想让你相信黎巴嫩南部是一场轻松的微风。❗️ 以色列在黎巴嫩南部的受伤人数已接近700人，其中有50-60人伤势严重或中度。这造成了大量的残疾和植物人。

text: The other that was killed was an old guy from the 226th Reserve Paratroopers Brigade's 7056th Battalion, from Adi. His family quoted him saying that he told them he went to the reserves because "there are not enough soldiers"
text_zh: 另一名阵亡者是来自预备役伞兵第226旅第7056营的一名老兵，来自阿迪（Adi）。他的家人援引他的话说，他之所以去服预备役，是因为“士兵不够用”。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 Israeli Channel 14: Israel is preparing for intense fighting in the Gaza Strip at the beginning of next month, after Hamas reiterated its refusal to demilitarise and disarm. The military is preparing to return to intense combat across all of Gaza to achieve those objectives. The deadline is the beginning of next month. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇵🇸 以色列第14频道：在哈马斯重申拒绝解除武装和遣散武装后，以色列正准备在下月初对加沙地带进行激烈的战斗。军方正准备在整个加沙地带恢复激烈的战斗以实现这些目标。最后期限是下月初。 @wfwitness

text: And btw For the second day in a row, Israeli soldier vehicles and soldiers fall into pre-layed IED traps. So far 2 have been confirmed killed and acknowledged by the Israelis. The latest was from the 769th "Hiram" Regional Brigade's 7106th Battalion, from Ashdod. Several other soldiers were seriously injured in coma or ICU and others moderately losing a couple of eyes, limbs or testicles.
text_zh: 顺便说一下，以色列士兵的车辆和士兵连续第二天掉入预先埋设的简易爆炸装置（IED）陷阱。到目前为止，已有2人被证实死亡，并得到以色列方面的承认。最近的一名阵亡者来自第769“希拉姆”（Hiram）地区旅第7106营，来自阿什杜德。其他几名士兵受重伤，处于昏迷或重症监护中，还有一些人中度受伤，失去了眼睛、肢体或睾丸。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Tasnim News Agency: Iran has warned that it is fully prepared for a possible resumption of war, citing recent U.S. military movements including warship redeployments, an unprecedented air bridge for equipment transfer, and extensive reconnaissance drone flights over Iranian islands. Tehran has outlined two scenarios: U.S. military posturing as psychological pressure to gain negotiating leverage, or a cover for a surprise attack – noting that Washington has twice struck Iran during ongoing negotiations. Iran stated that it has reconstructed and prepared over the past two weeks, and that any new conflict would create “memorable hellish hours” from the outset. If war resumes and Iranian infrastructure is targeted again, Tehran warned it will abandon previous restraint and expand the conflict to include Bab al‑Mandab, Saudi Aramco facilities, Yanbu, and Fujairah. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗警告称，鉴于美国最近的军事行动，包括军舰重新部署、前所未有的装备转运空中桥梁以及在伊朗岛屿上空进行的大规模侦察无人机飞行，伊朗已为可能恢复的战争做好了充分准备。德黑兰概述了两种情况：美国军事姿态是作为心理压力以获取谈判筹码，或者是为突然袭击打掩护——并指出华盛顿在谈判进行期间曾两次打击伊朗。伊朗表示，过去两周已经进行了重建和准备，任何新的冲突从一开始就会制造“令人难忘的地狱般时刻”。如果战争恢复且伊朗基础设施再次成为目标，德黑兰警告将放弃此前的克制，并将冲突扩大到包括曼德海峡、沙特阿美设施、延布和富查伊拉。 @wfwitness

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 BREAKING | In the Iranian news agency Tasnim, they claim: "Iran sees the war scenario as more likely than the continuation of negotiations. Therefore, Iran is ready, with the rehabilitation and preparations made in the last two weeks, to establish unforgettable hours of hell" See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇲 快讯 | 伊朗塔斯尼姆通讯社声称：“伊朗认为战争的可能性大于继续谈判。因此，伊朗已经准备好，通过过去两周的恢复和准备，创造令人难忘的地狱时刻。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Faytuks News Iranian officials suspect that the US might attack them even before the end of the ceasefire on Tuesday night -Axios tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 伊朗官员怀疑美国甚至可能在周二晚停火结束前就对他们发动攻击 - Axios 推文

text: Nuno Felix Of course we can be a side as Europe Speaking of Schrödinger’s phenomenon, here’s another one - Europe. Neither loyal enough towards its allies in times of war, nor neutral enough towards the rest of the world. If you can’t be a side, pick a side. 👇 - Velina Tchakarova tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 当然，作为欧洲，我们可以选择立场。说到薛定谔现象，这里还有另一个——欧洲。既没有在战争时期对盟友足够忠诚，也没有对世界其他地区保持足够中立。如果你不能保持中立，那就选边站吧。👇 - Velina Tchakarova 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's parliamentary national security chief Ibrahim Azizi to Al Jazeera: "Washington must accept the new mechanism for regulating activity in the Strait of Hormuz. There is no change in our positions regarding Iran's national interests." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗议会国家安全委员会主席易卜拉欣·阿齐兹（Ibrahim Azizi）对半岛电视台表示：“华盛顿必须接受规范霍尔木兹海峡活动的新机制。我们在伊朗国家利益方面的立场没有任何改变。” 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 Iran has replenished its arsenal of missile installations and drones during the declared ceasefire between the US and Tehran - Commander of the IRGC Aerospace Force, Majid Musavi. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队指挥官马吉德·穆萨维（Majid Musavi）表示，在美伊宣布停火期间，伊朗补充了其导弹装置和无人机的库存。推文

text: WarTranslated Zelensky says in his evening address that the US has again moved to ease oil sanctions and that it brings no real diplomatic benefit. He says important security cooperation updates with partners are coming next week. US has extended the waiver allowing countries to buy sanctioned Russian oil until May 16, Reuters reports. https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 - WarTranslated tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 泽连斯基在晚间讲话中表示，美国再次放宽了石油制裁，但这并没有带来任何实际的外交利益。他说，下周将有与合作伙伴的重要安全合作更新。据路透社报道，美国已将允许各国购买受制裁俄罗斯石油的豁免期延长至5月16日。https://www.reuters.com/business/energy/us-extends-waiver-allowing-countries-buy-russian-oil-2026-04-18/ https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045401896743993680/photo/1 - WarTranslated 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios - Trump says he'll send negotiators to Pakistan, BUT Iran denies planned talks and suspects U.S. is preparing a surprise attack tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Axios - 特朗普表示将派遣谈判代表前往巴基斯坦，但伊朗否认了计划中的会谈，并怀疑美国正在准备突然袭击。推文

text: OSINTdefender Playback from http://MarineTraffic.com of vessel traffic from the Strait of Hormuz to the entrance of the Gulf of Oman since 1200 UTC 17 April through 1600 UTC today (19 April) shows that several vessels transited the Strait until several attacks by Iran forced ships to turn around. There has been little movement through the Strait of Hormuz for the last 24 hours. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 根据 MarineTraffic.com 的回放，从4月17日1200 UTC到今天（4月19日）1600 UTC，从霍尔木兹海峡到阿曼湾入口的船只交通显示，几艘船只通过了海峡，直到伊朗的几次袭击迫使船只掉头。过去24小时内，通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只很少。推文

text: WarTranslated Russian Z-blogger Yevgeny Golman is again in hysterics over the Russian army’s situation at the front and the authorities’ helplessness. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045919947772096656/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯 Z 博客作者叶夫根尼·戈尔曼（Yevgeny Golman）再次对俄罗斯军队在前线的处境和当局的无能感到歇斯底里。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045919947772096656/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel FBI arrests an Iranian national at LAX for trafficking arms on behalf of the Iranian regime and coordinating with the IRGC. She brokered sales of Iranian-manufactured bombs, drones, assault weapons, and millions of rounds of ammunition to Sudan. One deal alone was worth 60 million euros. She also sold 55,000 bomb fuses to the Sudanese military. She's a lawful permanent U.S. resident living in Woodland Hills, California. - Fox News tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel FBI 在洛杉矶国际机场逮捕了一名伊朗国民，罪名是代表伊朗政权贩运武器并与伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）协调。她为向苏丹出售伊朗制造的炸弹、无人机、突击武器和数百万发弹药牵线搭桥。仅一笔交易就价值6000万欧元。她还向苏丹军方出售了55,000个炸弹引信。她是居住在加利福尼亚州伍德兰希尔斯的美国合法永久居民。 - Fox News 推文

text: Open Source Intel A “3+1” meeting involving Greece, Cyprus, Israel and the United States will be held in June in Washington. @GreekReporterr https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045919138653049058/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 涉及希腊、塞浦路斯、以色列和美国的“3+1”会议将于6月在华盛顿举行。@GreekReporterr https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045919138653049058/photo/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - USS Gerald R. Ford returns to the Middle East, along with 2 destroyers, USS Mahan and the USS Winston S. Churchill, joining USS Abraham Lincoln that is already operating in the north Arabian Sea. USS George HW Bush is also enroute, expected to arrive before end April — CBS https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045919053340918075/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 - 杰拉尔德·R·福特号航空母舰（USS Gerald R. Ford）连同两艘驱逐舰马汉号（USS Mahan）和温斯顿·S·丘吉尔号（USS Winston S. Churchill）返回中东，加入已经在阿拉伯海北部行动的亚伯拉罕·林肯号航空母舰（USS Abraham Lincoln）。乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（USS George HW Bush）也在途中，预计在4月底前抵达 — CBS https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2045919053340918075/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Fars News Agency reports that CNN claims an Iranian delegation – possibly including Abbas Araghchi and Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf – may travel to Islamabad on Tuesday. The report also suggests that, if negotiations advance, Masoud Pezeshkian and Donald Trump could attend in person. However, sources inside Iran say no final decision has been made, and the overall outlook remains negative. They add that as long as the U.S. naval blockade continues, Iran will not consider a second round of talks in Islamabad. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 法尔斯通讯社报道称，CNN 声称一个伊朗代表团——可能包括阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi）和穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）——可能会在周二前往伊斯兰堡。报道还暗示，如果谈判取得进展，马苏德·佩泽希齐扬（Masoud Pezeshkian）和唐纳德·特朗普可能会亲自出席。然而，伊朗内部消息人士称尚未做出最终决定，总体前景仍然负面。他们补充说，只要美国的海上封锁继续，伊朗就不会考虑在伊斯兰堡进行第二轮会谈。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hamas is trying to get mediators to allow for some reconstruction in Gaza without disarming. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045917469764665465/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 哈马斯正试图让调解人允许在不解除武装的情况下在加沙进行一些重建。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045917469764665465/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu will hold a limited security consultation by phone tonight in light of the US-Iran negotiations. ➡️ The political-security cabinet is also scheduled to meet tomorrow at noon. https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045916311516020800/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 鉴于美伊谈判，以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡今晚将通过电话进行有限的安全磋商。➡️ 政治安全内阁也定于明天中午开会。https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2045916311516020800/photo/1 推文

text: The area in Lebanon and the area in Syria The latter the IDF walked in without a single bullet fired, as the new leader and ex-ISIS leader was busy playing basketball with the commander of the U.S military from CENTCOM. Very fitting for a Sunni Muslim
text_zh: 黎巴嫩境内的区域和叙利亚境内的区域。后者是以色列国防军（IDF）在没有发射一颗子弹的情况下进入的，因为新领导人兼前 ISIS 领导人正忙着与美国中央司令部（CENTCOM）的指挥官打篮球。对于逊尼派穆斯林来说非常贴切。
